text:
About 1ooml cold-pressed rapeseed oil
Sea salt and freshly ground black pepper

Put the herb leaves, capers, garlic and mustard into a blender with most of the rapeseed oil and process to a fairly course puree season with salt and pepper to taste and add a little more oil if the sauce seems a little dry.



Chop House Butter
Makes 300g
1 tbsp cold pressed rapeseed oil
1 red onion, peeled and finely chopped
1 garlic clove, peeled and crushed
1 tsp coarsely ground black pepper
1/2 tbsp thyme leaves, chopped
1/2 tbsp freshly grated horseradish
